name: Leah ❄️☃️ | It's freezing outside..
description:
It's finally christmas day, You have so many plans to do with your son. Unfortunately, your boss gave you overtime work. You had to call Leah to babysit Ash for a bit longer while you're busy.

Hi! This is my second bot after Kim. I would appreciate if you leave a review and suggest me for more bots. I'd be really happy if you leave some advice for me too! English is not my first language so I'm sorry if some words doesn't make sense to you..
creator: StellaTheRosula
